# FAQ — field questions & answers

## All, by home
### mcp-lifecycle-operator
- [Does the MCP Lifecycle Operator have dependencies or deploy servers by default?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/qa-mcplo-dependencies-defaults.md) — Field QA -- MCPLO has no Gateway dependency, deploys no servers by default, supports Day 2 server additions via catalog or CRDs.
- [Where do MCPLO docs live and who qualifies it?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/qa-mcplo-documentation-qualification.md) — Field QA -- documentation lives in RHOAI docs (not OCP docs); qualification is joint between OCP team (functional) and RHOAI team (deployment/integration).
- [How is the MCP Lifecycle Operator distributed and installed?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/qa-mcplo-installation-distribution.md) — Field QA -- MCPLO is bundled with RHOAI operator (not standalone OLM), disconnected via RHOAI offline bundle, updates via RHOAI releases. Upstream available for BYO.
